info.title: StuArchive Raw API
info.description: Static JSON mirror of public Blue Archive data exposed by Kivo Wiki. This OpenAPI document is intended for Apifox or other OpenAPI-compatible tools.

tags.name: Single resources
tags.description: Kivo single JSON responses mirrored as static files.

tags.name: Collection indexes
tags.description: Aggregated collection indexes generated by StuArchive.

tags.name: Lookup indexes
tags.description: Precomputed static lookup indexes for IDs and aliases.

tags.name: Details
tags.description: Per-id detail files generated when detail sync is enabled.

get.description: StuArchive generated entrypoint listing all resources and Raw URLs.

Kivo API root/version response.

Upstream path: `/`.

Site-level public counters.

Upstream path: `/statistics/index`.

Current event window.

Upstream path: `/data/event/now`.

Current raid window.

Upstream path: `/data/raid/now`.

Current pickup banner student IDs.

Upstream path: `/data/pick_up/`.

Current lucky item.

Upstream path: `/data/lucky_item/`.

Students with birthdays this week.

Upstream path: `/data/students/birthday/week`.

Student list and per-student profiles.

Aggregated collection index generated by StuArchive. Upstream path: `/data/students/`. List field: `students`.

Precomputed client-side lookup index for `students`. Use `by_id`, `by_alias`, or `by_normalized_alias` to resolve a requested name/title/id to the mirrored item payload. Normalized aliases use NFKC, casefold, and whitespace removal.
Original Kivo paginated response mirrored by StuArchive. Page numbers start at 1. Upstream path: `/data/students/`.
Per-id detail response. This file exists only after syncing with `python3 scripts/sync.py --include-details`. Upstream template: `/data/students/{id}`.

Original Kivo paginated response mirrored by StuArchive. Page numbers start at 1. Upstream path: `/data/items/`.
Per-id detail response. This file exists only after syncing with `python3 scripts/sync.py --include-details`. Upstream template: `/data/items/{id}`.
